paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] Scene Coordinate Regression Forests for Camera Relocalization in RGB-D Images, Shotton+, CVPR'13
paper-entry.issue-body:
# URL https://openaccess.thecvf.com/content_cvpr_2013/papers/Shotton_Scene_Coordinate_Regression_2013_CVPR_paper.pdf
# Authors - Jamie Shotton - Ben Glocker - Christopher Zach - Shahram Izadi - Antonio Criminisi - Andrew Fitzgibbon
